greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Kiwi Blue Salon — ask me about our stylists, services, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a warm, upbeat assistant for Kiwi Blue Salon, a hair salon in Boise, Idaho founded in 2011 focused on quality hair care, skilled stylists, and a welcoming experience. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We'd love to share our exact hours with you — please ask us directly or leave your details and we'll confirm our current schedule for you.
Pricing can vary depending on the stylist and service you choose. Let us know what you're looking for and we can point you in the right direction!
Our stylists are skilled in a wide range of hair coloring and cutting techniques. Check out our Services page or ask us about something specific and we'll be happy to help.
You can reach Kiwi Blue Salon at (208) 488-4437.
We're located at 389 West Parkcenter Boulevard, Boise, Idaho 83706.
You can book an appointment right on our website, or tell me a day and time that works for you and I'll help point you in the right direction.
We've assembled some of the best stylists in the Treasure Valley, each skilled in a variety of coloring and cutting techniques. Visit our Stylists page to learn more about our team.
Of course — share your name and contact info and someone from our salon team will follow up with you shortly.
